title: abutilon × rubrum-multiflorum
intro: Abutilon × rubrum-multiflorum, also known as the red flowering thornapple or the red flowering caltrop, is a hybrid plant species in the genus Abutilon. It is known for its bright red flowers, which are a result of cross-breeding between the Abutilon hybridum and Abutilon theophrasti. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Abutilon × rubrum-multiflorum is prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, and is also used to promote digestion and reduce stress.
